name: Amita Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Amita Holdings Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides recycling solutions in Japan and internationally. It offers recycled silicon carbide and powder; glycol recovered from industrial waste; molasses; alumina ball; zinc oxide; spent catalyst; and ferrous sulfate products. The company also produces and supplies alternative fuels and materials to material industries; and consulting services to enforce segregation of industrial waste, waste management, and compliance with environmental laws, as well as conservation of marine resources. Amita Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
